calendar.matters:
Ntc Of Hearing On Petition For Writ Of Mandate/Alt Petition For Writ Of Prohibition From The Suspension Of Petitioner'S California Drivers License And Certified Administrative Record
Off Calendar Jul-22-2014 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Michael Linscheid, Esq. of the Law Office of Michael Linscheid, Tel. 415.782.6002, for petitioner and moving party;
Terry A. Senne, Esq., Deputy Attorney General, Tel. 510.622.2118, for respondent and opposing party.

RULING: The matter was argued. At the conclusion of argument, the Court adopted the tentative ruling. PETITIONER TIMOTHY HEFFERNAN'S Petition For Writ Of Mandate/Alternative Petition For Writ Of Prohibition From The Suspension Of Petitioner's California Drivers License is denied. Petitioner has not established by the preponderance of the evidence that the administrative findings are contrary to the weight of the evidence. The evidence supports the hearing officer's conclusion, as it establishes that Officer Pettit read Petitioner the chemical test admonishment from the DS-367 and Officer Pettit repeatedly attempted to advise petitioner that the right to counsel did not apply to his decision regarding whether to submit to chemical testing. ORDER SIGNED. Judge: A. James Robertson II; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR# 5976.

Ntc Of Hearing On Petition For Writ Of Mandate/Alt Petition For Writ Of Prohibition From The Suspension Of Petitioner'S California Drivers License And Certified Administrative Record
Off Calendar Jul-09-2014 Continued To Jul-22-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PETITIONER TIMOTHY HEFFERNAN'S Petition For Writ Of Mandate/Alternatively Petition For Writ Of Prohibition From The Suspension Of Petitioner's California Drivers License And Certified Administrative Record is continued to July 22, 2014 to give opposing party the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Opposing party must deliver courtesy copies of the opposition papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than July 9, 2014 at 4:00 pm or the motion will be granted. Any exhibit must be separated by an exhibit tab per CRC 3.1110(f). The court has courtesy copies of the moving and reply papers.
Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert, Not reported. =302/ehg
